$comment: The /api proxy MUST come before the SPA catch-all. Replace REPLACE-WITH-BACKEND-HOST with your deployed backend origin (e.g. movaia-partners-api.up.railway.app). This same-origin proxy keeps the httpOnly auth cookie first-party (SameSite=Lax). See README 'Build & deploy'. Alternative: delete the /api rewrite and set VITE_API_URL to the backend origin, but then the backend must issue SameSite=None; Secure cookies.
